name: Full Consensus (Contra Ask Concentration)
hypothesis: A high-conviction long signal occurs when there is strong bid pressure (high obi_1), supporting deep-book liquidity (high obi_ex_bbo), and a lack of sell-side resistance (low ask_depth_concentration). Combining these three orthogonal factors should yield a signal with higher expectancy than any individual component.
mutation_note: De-novo spec combining three of the strongest primitives from Block C and OBI families. The formula is designed to maximize when bid pressure is high across depths (`obi_1`, `obi_ex_bbo`) and ask-side resistance is low (`ask_depth_concentration` is subtracted as it's a contra-indicator).
